theme: News from Social Media vs. Traditional Media

sentences.english: Do you get your news from social media or traditional media like newspapers and TV?
sentences.korean: 소셜 미디어와 신문 TV 같은 전통 매체 중 어디서 뉴스를 얻습니까?

sentences.english: Explain which you prefer and why.
While I get most of my news from social media I think traditional media is still more reliable.
sentences.korean: 소셜 미디어에서 뉴스를 대부분 얻지만 전통 매체가 여전히 더 신뢰할 수 있다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: Social media is incredibly fast — breaking news appears within seconds.
sentences.korean: 소셜 미디어는 놀라울 정도로 빨라요 — 속보가 몇 초 안에 나타나요.

sentences.english: But the problem is that speed often comes at the expense of accuracy and many posts contain misleading information or outright false claims.
sentences.korean: 하지만 문제는 속도가 종종 정확성을 희생시킨다는 거예요. 많은 게시물이 오해의 소지가 있는 정보나 완전한 거짓 주장을 포함해요.

sentences.english: Traditional outlets like major newspapers have editors and fact-checkers that verify information before publishing it.
sentences.korean: 주요 신문 같은 전통 매체에는 게시 전에 정보를 확인하는 편집자와 팩트체커가 있어요.

sentences.english: My ideal approach is to use social media for speed but always verify important stories through trusted traditional sources.
sentences.korean: 이상적인 접근은 속도를 위해 소셜 미디어를 쓰되 중요한 기사는 항상 신뢰할 수 있는 전통 매체로 확인하는 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: News from Social Media vs. Traditional Media
Attending a Large vs. Small School
